raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX - ATM cash withdrawal {$180.00} XX/XX/XXXX - Cash advance fee {$10.00} XX/XX/XXXX - Credit card charge XXXX XX/XX/XXXX - minumum charge {$1.00} Customer Service has taken forever to get a hold of and is poorly able to handle the issue. They told they would remove the charges but they still have not. But my greater issue is that they allowed the criminal to add an authorized user, change my pin, email, etc. It's absurd that it was allowed and that I have to go through the process of calling and spending hours to try to resolve this. 

This is with Best Buy Citi card with card number ending XXXX.
